name: Nevada Coin & Jewelry East
description_short: Nevada Coin & Jewelry buys and sells gold, silver, coins, jewelry, and diamonds in Las Vegas. Licensed precious metals dealer with 30+ years of experience.
description_long:
Nevada Coin & Jewelry has operated as a precious metals and jewelry buyer since 1984, when it began as the Jewelry Exchange on the Las Vegas Strip at the site of what is now The Paris Hotel. The company has evolved into one of Las Vegas and Henderson's largest buyers of jewelry, gold, silver, sterling silver, platinum, coins, and bullion, maintaining a strong reputation in the numismatic and precious metals community.

The business offers both buying and selling services across multiple precious metal categories. Customers can sell gold, silver, platinum, coins, bullion, jewelry, and diamonds for cash. They also operate as a dealer, offering coins and bullion for purchase to collectors and investors. The company employs GIA-trained staff to evaluate items and maintains a licensed operation under Clark County regulations.

Nevada Coin & Jewelry distinguishes itself through professional customer service, transparency in valuations, and a commitment to fair pricing. The company advertises a BBB A+ rating and emphasizes that staff take time to explain valuation rationale and item history to customers. Multiple reviews highlight courteous, knowledgeable service and a non-judgmental approach to transactions. The physical storefront includes interesting items for sale and display, creating a more curated experience than typical pawn shops.

The primary limitation is operational availability—the East Flamingo location operates Monday–Friday 9:30 am–4:30 pm with Saturday by appointment only, which may be inconvenient for some customers. As a buy-and-sell precious metals dealer rather than a traditional pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, Nevada Coin & Jewelry does not provide short-term lending or quick-cash advances. The company is geographically limited to a single Las Vegas location.
address: 2675 E Flamingo Rd #10, Las Vegas, NV 89121

company_info.headquarters: 2675 E Flamingo Rd #10, Las Vegas, NV 89121

pros: BBB A+ rating and 30+ years of operating history since 1984
GIA-trained staff providing expert evaluation of precious metals and diamonds
Transparent valuation process with staff explaining price reasoning and item history
Licensed by Clark County to legally buy jewelry from the general public
Consistently positive customer reviews highlighting professional and courteous service
Buys and sells across multiple categories: gold, silver, coins, bullion, jewelry, diamonds
Non-judgmental customer service with patient handling of first-time sellers
cons: Limited hours (closed Sundays, Saturdays by appointment only) restrict access
Single location in East Las Vegas limits convenience for Henderson and distant customers
Does not offer collateral-based loans or cash advances like traditional pawn shops
No stated online purchasing or remote evaluation options mentioned on website
best_for: Individuals liquidating inherited jewelry or precious metals from estates
Coin and bullion collectors buying or selling numismatic items
People seeking fair valuations and expert appraisals of gold, silver, or diamonds
Customers prioritizing professional service and transparent pricing over speed or convenience
diagnosis: Nevada Coin & Jewelry is best for people with precious metals, coins, or jewelry to sell who prioritize fair valuation, expert appraisal, and professional service over quick cash access. The main caveat is that this is a buy-sell dealer, not a lending service—it does not provide collateral-based loans or emergency cash advances.
